● Awakener "Mouchette"
    ○  Warborn Rank, HP 100.
    ○  Exalt "Shining☆Tornado": Consumes 100 points of Aliemus. Dispel self debuffs and deal 10 DMG to all enemies. For each dead ally, deal 1 additional instance of DMG.
    ○  Skill "Mistbreaker Slash": Arithmetica Cost 3. Randomly deal 3 instances of 3 DMG; for each "Strike" played this turn, increase DMG by 2, and it also counts as a "Strike".
    ○  Skill "Devastating Cleave": Arithmetica Cost 2. Deal 6 Bleed to all enemies. Each "Strike" played reduces Arithmetica Cost by 1, can be used 3 times.
    ○  Skill "Adversity Rage": Arithmetica Cost 1. Delay: Enhance self and gain 30 Aliemus.
● Wheel of Destiny and Posse
    ○  Wheel of Destiny "Doomsday Rampage": Arithmetica Cost 4. "Strike" DMG +25%; after any ally plays a "Strike", draw 1 card, triggering up to 2 times each round.
    ○  Wheel of Destiny "Light of Intellect": Arithmetica Cost 3. All allies' "Strike" DMG +25%.
    ○  Posse "From the Mist Realm": Shuffle 3 random allies' "Strike" cards into the Draw Pile.
Is this the revert every nerf that happened and see how it goes patch?
they should just kept queen's edict how it is
now everybody going to run it again

● Mechanism
    ○  Void: Redone. The owner’s Aliemus and Delayed Aliemus are reduced by 100%, and all Delayed Aliemus are immediately removed when applied.
So now they are trying to make the Posse card the strongest card in the deck.
○  Prepare: The preparation effect can now stack.
the pollux pose has yet more value
Don't think so, meta will probably be too fast for delayed damage to work
gmurphy back to being a menace also
○  "Manikin of Oblivion": No longer causes the attacker to lose Aliemus.
void now straight up erase all aliemus
"Special Training": Arithmetica cost reduced from 5 to 3. When equipped, no longer gain Arithmetica Limit; instead, the gained "Insight" is added to hand.

Before: -5 Aliemus then +10 Aliemus from the strike you played, net +5
After: +0 Aliemus from the strike you played
